use_cases: Team member showcase cards on company about pages
Contact directory with hover reveal animations
Speaker or presenter cards for events and conferences
Employee profile cards in internal dashboards
ai_summary: A contact card component featuring a profile image with grayscale-to-color hover transition and reveal animations. The card expands on hover, transitioning from a thumbnail view to reveal contact details. Supports both light and dark modes with smooth CSS transitions for the image scale, grayscale filter, and text element animations.
